code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test20-APR-2023Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows evidence of impaired renal function (elevated creatinine, significant proteinuria), abnormal urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, bilirubin, ketones, glucosuria), and hypoglycemia with low HbA1c, suggesting possible chronic kidney disease with glycemic disturbances. No signs of urinary tract infection are present. Further nephrological and metabolic evaluation is recommended.
